subcodes.first_line: Thou knowest, O my God, my lowliness and poverty, my destitution and desperate need, my utter devotion, my supplications, and my complete self-effacement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت تعلم یا الهی ذلی و مسکنتی و فقری و مسغبتی و تبتلی و تضرعی و تذللی
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @suffering; rejection of Christ
